name: Combat_Mech

infobox.Systems: Titan Fist(Prime)EffectPunch an adjacent tile, damaging and pushing it.(2 damage)Upgrade IDash ()Charge any distance before punching the target.Upgrade II+2 Damage ()Increases damage by 2.

sections.Team: The mech is available as part of theRift Walkerssquad. It is their prime mech.
sections.Strategy:
The Combat Mech is the Rift Walkers main damage dealer and tank, designed to reliably fight and block Vek in the front lines while being given support by artillery. It's damage output is overall high as it can deal 2-4 points of damage, depending how much it has been upgraded, along with an additional point of bump damage. The push can help other mechs get in range to hit the Vek again if it was not downed.
In the Rift Walkers squad, it is wise to invest in increased movement and theDashupgrade for Titan Fist first, due to the squads overall low starting mobility. However, in a custom squad, damage might be more important to prioritize first depending on the other mech. Longterm the dash ability is expendable; it can be kept if lacking another (ranged) weapon, but otherwise the two power cores can be reallocated later.
Most pilots will work, but a notable pilot recommendation isGanato let it immediately deploy near enemy Vek.
